channel.title: Kubernetes on History
channel.description: Recent content in Kubernetes on History

item.title: K8sPatterns.02 Predictable Demands
item.description: Chapter 2 of Kubernetes Patterns — how to declare container resource needs so the scheduler can make optimal placement decisions.

item.title: K8sPatterns.01 Introduction
item.description: A beginner-friendly summary of Chapter 1 from Kubernetes Patterns — covering containers, pods, services, labels, annotations, and namespaces.
